meaning: n.(辣ｧ逶ｸ逕ｨ)譏ｾ蠕ｮ髟懷､ｴ,譏ｾ蠕ｮ騾城復
examples: Each microlens functions as a kind of superpixel.
The microlens arrays are the important kind of micro-optics elements.
Pattern transfer technique is used to transfer photoresist microlens arrays into the polymer underlayer.
Light passing through each microlens focuses at a point a few tenths of a millimetre beyond it, and thereafter spreads out as a cone.
